name: Transport & Payments Desk
shortBio: Maintains practical pages about payments, rail, airport transfers, booking flows, and day-one travel basics in China.
fullBio: The Transport & Payments Desk maintains practical trip-basics coverage related to arrival, payment setup, high-speed rail, airport transfers, ride-hailing, connectivity, and booking behavior. Its focus is making sure traveler-facing logistics pages answer the exact problem clearly, not just list broad options.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for traveler-facing clarity, operational realism, and whether the advice still matches current payment, booking, and transport usage patterns.
seoTitle: Transport & Payments Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains transport, payments, and trip-basics coverage on China Travel Notes.
